tickets.subject: [iOS App Store] Rewards points feel like a black box — request for points history
tickets.description: Honestly love this app, ordering ahead has saved me so much time in the mornings. My only wish is that I could see a breakdown of how I earned my points — like per order, per item, something. Right now you just see the total and it feels like a black box. Would love a points history screen that shows each transaction and how many points it added or deducted. Probably a small thing but it would make me actually pay attention to the rewards program more. Four stars, would be five with that change.

tickets.subject: [In-App Chat] Not receiving pickup-ready notifications (waited ~15 minutes)
tickets.description: I placed my order this morning at 8:47am and waited at the pickup counter for almost 15 minutes. Nobody told me it was ready — I only found out because I happened to look up and saw my cup sitting there. I have notifications turned on, I checked. My phone isn't on do not disturb. This has happened twice now in the past week. If the whole point of the app is to order ahead and skip the wait, it kind of defeats the purpose if I still have to stand there staring at the counter. Please fix this.

tickets.subject: [Support Email] Expected double-points weekend but saw normal points
tickets.description: Hi there, long-time customer and big fan of the app generally. I wanted to flag something that confused me recently. I placed an order on Saturday and when I checked my points afterward it looked like I got the same amount as a regular day. I thought I saw something on Instagram about a double points weekend? Maybe I misunderstood or it wasn't active yet, just wanted to mention it in case something wasn't working right. Happy to send a screenshot if that helps. Thanks for all you do!
